_comment: CLC raster code -> crop-type combustion weight w_crop(c) for biomass burning proxy. Derived via two-factor framework: w = (f_emep * s_emep) / max(f_emep * s_emep). f_emep = fraction of CORINE class under EMEP/EEA Table 3-2 crops (cereals + rice + legumes); s_emep = production-weighted mean residue-to-yield ratio over that fraction (Strehler & Stutzle 1987 via IPCC 2000). EF is crop-type-independent (Andreae 2019), so w scales with fuel load only. Normalisation maximum at CLC 14 (rice): f=1.00 * s=1.40 = 1.40.

_clc_names.19: Annual crops associated with permanent crops (241)
_clc_names.21: Land principally under agriculture with significant areas of natural vegetation (243)
